privileged_info_summary: The task uses the publicly available Natural Earth 110m Admin 0 Countries dataset from naciscdn.org. This dataset contains exactly 13 South American countries (including Falkland Islands as a separate feature). All 5 required countries (Brazil, Argentina, Chile, Colombia, Peru) are present in the dataset. Centroid coordinates for South American features range from approximately -78.38 to -53.05 longitude and -51.71 to 7.16 latitude. The expected output should contain 13 rows (within the task's 10-15 range). The data is real, publicly accessible, and sourced from the North American Cartographic Information Society (NACIS).
